nodes.text: I am the target they want to reach — their demographic if you will. Disconnected age, so easy it would be to unionize our like-minded culturally significant dopplegangers.
Our individual hopes and fears rest with the many who — just like us, nothing like us — divide our selves along so many lines where does one allegiance begin another entwined frayed end.
How strong our convictions, we pardon bare comfort passion forfeit in due processed manufactured winter closed for. Church bells rage on the hour glorious to earhold several blocks away.

INFOGRAPHIC: Taste in music defined as follows — a mix of genres, an arrow through personal experience running parallel but never intersecting the dissemination of good times along an all right quotidian.
OR: Today is Sunday. I worship the Sun, or at least pause in place to firmly address with a hand and a squint the Sun I give a smile and word to, as it is a good Sun.
AS: I worship many a thing. The state of mind I’ve occupied since earliest memory is of worship — abject — live in praise of it all.
PICTURE AND TEXT — my first memory: two-dimensional car driving up a storybook hill with sunshining bright behind.
CRUDE ANIMATION AND VOICE OF CHILD: An old woman asked a young me what is it when I held a ladybug up to the sky. I replied everything. She tried to correct me.
I smile on the world always hope that is enough to get me to the next.
I write to begin something — the act itself brings about dimension. Every line carries certain candid suspense.
I want to tell you all about the fictional world to come. If I’m too eager to begin, forgive me — I’m just excited is all.
DISCLAIMER: within this filmed textual experience — a pseudo-documented journey deemed worthy of your attention. Pick and choose to believe what you will. You are both the audience and not.
(weak) I try to be heard so please hear me. Ba— my voice is getting through.
There were many paths before. I selfishly wanted to be — do everything.
Parents indulged the dreamer and here I am enacting great schemes.
I always wanted to write. Never wanted to be a Writer.
